requirement_topic.en: FCC Equipment Authorisation — EMC / Radio Frequency Emissions
requirement_topic.zh: FCC设备授权——电磁兼容/射频辐射
requirement_topic.zht: FCC設備授權——電磁相容/射頻輻射

summary.en: Household refrigerators with electronic controls, displays, or wireless connectivity (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth for smart features) are subject to FCC equipment authorisation under 47 CFR Part 15 (Radio Frequency Devices). Basic refrigerators with simple electromechanical controls and no digital circuitry may not be regulated as FCC Part 15 devices; however, virtually all modern refrigerators incorporate digital thermostats, compressor controllers, or displays that generate unintentional radio frequency emissions. Such products are Class B digital devices under 47 CFR Part 15 Subpart B and must comply with FCC Part 15 unintentional emissions limits. Compliance is demonstrated via Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) by an accredited laboratory for Class B intentional and unintentional radiators, or full FCC certification for intentional radiators (wireless modules). The FCC ID (for intentional radiators) or FCC SDoC statement must appear in product documentation.
summary.zh: 配有电子控制、显示屏或无线连接功能（如Wi-Fi、蓝牙智能功能）的家用电冰箱，须依据47 CFR第15部分（射频设备）进行FCC设备授权。仅配备简单机电控制且无数字电路的基础型电冰箱可能不受FCC第15部分设备监管；但实际上，几乎所有现代电冰箱均内置数字温控器、压缩机控制器或显示屏，会产生非故意射频辐射。此类产品属于47 CFR第15部分B子部分下的B类数字设备，须符合FCC第15部分非故意辐射限值。合规性通过认可实验室为B类故意和非故意辐射体出具的供应商符合性声明（SDoC）证明，故意辐射体（无线模块）则须完成完整的FCC认证。FCC ID（针对故意辐射体）或FCC SDoC声明须出现在产品文件中。
summary.zht: 配有電子控制、顯示屏或無線連接功能（如Wi-Fi、藍牙智能功能）的家用電冰箱，須依據47 CFR第15部分（射頻設備）進行FCC設備授權。僅配備簡單機電控制且無數字電路的基礎型電冰箱可能不受FCC第15部分設備監管；但實際上，幾乎所有現代電冰箱均內置數字溫控器、壓縮機控制器或顯示屏，會產生非故意射頻輻射。此類產品屬於47 CFR第15部分B子部分下的B類數字設備，須符合FCC第15部分非故意輻射限值。合規性通過認可實驗室為B類故意和非故意輻射體出具的供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）證明，故意輻射體（無線模組）則須完成完整的FCC認證。FCC ID（針對故意輻射體）或FCC SDoC聲明須出現在產品文件中。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 15 — FCC Radio Frequency Devices (unintentional and intentional radiators)
47 CFR Part 15 Subpart B — Unintentional radiators (Class B digital devices)
47 CFR Part 15 Subpart C — Intentional radiators (wireless modules requiring FCC ID)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators with electronic/digital components are subject to GB 4343.1 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission — Product family standard) and GB/T 4343.2 (immunity). Smart refrigerators with wireless connectivity also require MIIT network access certification (entry into the network licence). Chinese EMC certification under GB 4343.1 and CCC is not accepted as a substitute for FCC Part 15 authorisation.
summary.zh: 在中国，配有电子/数字元件的家用电冰箱须满足GB 4343.1（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射——产品族标准）及GB/T 4343.2（抗扰度）要求。具有无线连接功能的智能冰箱还须取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可（进网许可）。依据GB 4343.1取得的中国电磁兼容认证和CCC认证，不被接受作为FCC第15部分授权的替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，配有電子/數字元件的家用電冰箱須滿足GB 4343.1（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射——產品族標準）及GB/T 4343.2（抗擾度）要求。具有無線連接功能的智能冰箱還須取得工業和信息化部網絡接入許可（進網許可）。依據GB 4343.1取得的中國電磁相容認證和CCC認證，不被接受作為FCC第15部分授權的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Emission (CCC mandatory)

gap.en: Exporters must test to FCC Part 15 Class B unintentional emission limits using an FCC-recognised accredited test laboratory and issue an SDoC. If the refrigerator contains intentional wireless radiators (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth), those modules require a separate FCC ID (granted via Certification route) or a modular approval. Chinese GB 4343.1 test reports are not accepted. The FCC SDoC or FCC ID labelling must appear on the product and in the user manual in English. FCC Part 15 applies in addition to UL NRTL safety certification — both are independently required for electronic-control models.
gap.zh: 出口商须由FCC认可的认可检测实验室进行FCC第15部分B类非故意辐射限值测试，并出具SDoC。若冰箱包含故意无线辐射体（Wi-Fi、蓝牙），相关模块须独立取得FCC ID（通过认证路径授予）或模块化批准。中国GB 4343.1检测报告不被接受。FCC SDoC或FCC ID标识须以英文出现在产品及用户手册中。FCC第15部分与UL NRTL安全认证相互独立，对于电子控制型号，两者均须独立满足。
gap.zht: 出口商須由FCC認可的認可檢測實驗室進行FCC第15部分B類非故意輻射限值測試，並出具SDoC。若冰箱包含故意無線輻射體（Wi-Fi、藍牙），相關模組須獨立取得FCC ID（通過認證路徑授予）或模組化批准。中國GB 4343.1檢測報告不被接受。FCC SDoC或FCC ID標識須以英文出現在產品及用戶手冊中。FCC第15部分與UL NRTL安全認證相互獨立，對於電子控制型號，兩者均須獨立滿足。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FCC Part 15 SDoC (or FCC ID for intentional radiators) required for US market; no FCC authorisation = unlawful US sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1 EMC compliance under CCC for Chinese market; MIIT network access licence for wireless-connected models

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FCC Part 15 authorisation is mandatory for modern refrigerators with digital controls or wireless features. SDoC by an FCC-recognised lab is the typical route for unintentional radiators; FCC ID certification is required for intentional radiators (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth modules). Chinese GB 4343.1 certification is not accepted. Both FCC and NRTL certifications are independently required.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】对于配有数字控制或无线功能的现代电冰箱，FCC第15部分授权属强制要求。非故意辐射体通常通过FCC认可实验室出具SDoC；故意辐射体（Wi-Fi/蓝牙模块）须取得FCC ID认证。中国GB 4343.1认证不被接受。FCC认证和NRTL认证须独立满足。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】對於配有數字控制或無線功能的現代電冰箱，FCC第15部分授權屬強制要求。非故意輻射體通常通過FCC認可實驗室出具SDoC；故意輻射體（Wi-Fi/藍牙模組）須取得FCC ID認證。中國GB 4343.1認證不被接受。FCC認證和NRTL認證須獨立滿足。
